message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam actorBorderColor #000000
skinparam databaseBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam databaseBorderColor #000000

participant "NavBar" as NavBar
participant "ReduxStore" as ReduxStore
participant "UserActions" as UserActions
participant "UserReducer" as UserReducer
participant "ProfileMiddleware" as ProfileMiddleware
participant "Solid.js" as SolidJs
database "POD" as POD

NavBar -> ReduxStore: loadEmailRequest()
ReduxStore -> UserActions: dispatch(loadEmailRequest())
UserActions -> ProfileMiddleware: loadEmailRequest()
ProfileMiddleware -> SolidJs: getEmail()
SolidJs -> POD: getEmail()
POD --> SolidJs: email
SolidJs --> ProfileMiddleware: email

alt [email successfully loaded]
    ReduxStore -> UserActions: dispatch(loadEmailSuccess(email))
    UserActions -> UserReducer: loadEmailSuccess(email)
    UserReducer -> UserReducer: updateState(email)
    UserReducer --> ReduxStore: updated state with email
else [error at loading email]
    SolidJs --> ProfileMiddleware: error
    ReduxStore -> UserActions: dispatch(loadEmailError(error))
    UserActions -> UserReducer: loadEmailError(error)
    UserReducer -> UserReducer: updateState(error)
    UserReducer --> ReduxStore: updated state
end

ReduxStore --> NavBar: state

note right of POD
line = method
dash line = data
end note

@enduml
